hero.subtitle: Content Creator • Camera Operator • Director's Assistant

about.title: About Me
about.subtitle: The story
paragraphs: As a passionate content creator, camera operator, and director's assistant, I bring stories to life through the lens. With years of experience in the film industry, I specialize in creating visually stunning content that resonates with audiences.

My approach combines technical expertise with creative vision, ensuring every project achieves its full potential. From commercial work to music videos and documentaries, I'm dedicated to delivering exceptional results.

skills.title: Cinematography
skills.description: Crafting visual narratives with light and shadow.

skills.title: Director's Assistant
skills.description: Supporting the creative vision on set.

skills.title: Content Creation
skills.description: Engaging digital content for modern platforms.

portfolio.title: Selected works
portfolio.description: A collection of creative projects showcasing expertise in cinematography, camera operation, and visual storytelling.

projects.title: Urban Stories
projects.description: A cinematic exploration of city life through dynamic camera movements and compelling narratives.
projects.fullDescription: Urban Stories is a deep dive into the heartbeat of the metropolis. We utilized fast-paced camera work and dynamic lighting to capture the essence of modern city living.
projects.tools: ARRI Alexa Mini, Atlas Orion Anamorphic Lenses, DJI Ronin 2

projects.title: Rhythm & Light
projects.description: High-energy music video featuring innovative lighting techniques and creative visual storytelling.
projects.fullDescription: Rhythm & Light was conceived as a visual representation of sound. We used synchronized lighting arrays and rapid camera movements to match the tempo of the track.
projects.tools: RED V-Raptor, Cooke Panchro/i Classic, Astera Titan Tubes

projects.title: Behind the Lens
projects.description: An intimate documentary capturing the creative process of filmmaking from a unique perspective.
projects.fullDescription: This documentary strips away the glamour of the film industry to reveal the raw, often grueling reality of independent filmmaking.
projects.tools: Sony FX6, Sigma Art Primes, Easyrig

projects.title: Motion Portraits
projects.description: Elegant commercial work showcasing products through sophisticated camera operation and lighting.
projects.fullDescription: Motion Portraits elevates standard product videography into the realm of fine art through meticulous lighting and precise motion control.
projects.tools: Phantom Flex4K, Laowa Probe Lens, Bolt Motion Control

projects.title: Cinematic Dreams
projects.description: Atmospheric music video blending surreal visuals with precise technical execution.
projects.fullDescription: A surreal journey through the subconscious mind, utilizing practical effects and in-camera transitions to create a dreamlike atmosphere.
projects.tools: ARRI Alexa 35, Master Primes, HydroFlex Housing

projects.title: Real Stories
projects.description: Authentic documentary storytelling with a focus on human connection and emotional depth.
projects.fullDescription: Real Stories is a poignant exploration of community resilience, shot entirely on location with natural lighting to maintain authenticity.
projects.tools: Canon C300 Mark III, Canon L-Series Zooms

contact.title: Let's Work Together
contact.subtitle: Get in touch
contact.description: Available for freelance opportunities worldwide. Let's create something extraordinary.
